page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A tool for unsupervised construction of RNA family models
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for unsupervised construction of rna family models
page_metadata.biotools__summary: RNAlien is a tool for automatic construction of RNA family models from a single sequence. Results include a covariance model, structural alignment and consensus secondary structure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RNAlien is a tool for automatic construction of RNA family models from a single sequence. Results include a covariance model, structural alignment and consensus secondary structure.
